title: Bowl of Saki
author: Hazrat Inayat Khan
description: This is a daily guide. This booklet contains wisdom and enlightenment for daily use. Open it and read the inspired words by Hazrat Inayat Khan. Moreover one may use it as a reminder of the birthdays of one's relatives and friends. Request them to sign the book on the date of their birth, and it will be as a treasure house of your dear ones.
